Title: User logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User logs in with incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: User attempts to log in without entering credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Leave the username and password fields empty.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are missing.

Title: User registers successfully
Test Data: Username: newuser, Password: newpassword, Confirm Password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username, password, and confirm password.
3. Click the register button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User attempts to register with existing username
Test Data: Username: existinguser, Password: newpassword, Confirm Password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username, password, and confirm password.
3. Click the register button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the username is already taken.

Title: User attempts to register with mismatched passwords
Test Data: Username: newuser, Password: newpassword, Confirm Password: wrongpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username, password, and confirm password.
3. Click the register button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the passwords do not match.

Title: User views home page after successful registration
Test Data: Username: newuser, Password: newpassword, Confirm Password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username, password, and confirm password.
3. Click the register button.
4. Navigate to the home page.
Expected Result: User is on the home page.

Title: User views home page after failed login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the login button.
4. Navigate to the home page.
Expected Result: User is not on the home page and an error message is displayed.

Title: User views proposal list after failed login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the login button.
4. Navigate to the proposal list page.
Expected Result: User is not on the proposal list page and an error message is displayed.

Title: User views proposal list after successful registration
Test Data: Username: newuser, Password: newpassword, Confirm Password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username, password, and confirm password.
3. Click the register button.
4. Navigate to the proposal list page.
Expected Result: User is on the proposal list page.

Title: User navigates to the board activity after failed login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the login button.
4. Navigate to the board activity.
Expected Result: User is not on the board activity page and an error message is displayed.

Title: User retrieves and views board items after failed login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the login button.
4. Navigate to the board activity.
5. Attempt to retrieve and view board items.
Expected Result: User is not able to retrieve and view board items and an error message is displayed.
